item.title: First reading, referred to Higher Education & Workforce Development.
item.description: First reading, referred to Higher Education & Workforce Development.
item.guid: 2026-01-27/First reading, referred to Higher Education & Workforce Development.

item.title: 👍Shelly Sakiyama-Elbert - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Shelly Sakiyama-Elbert signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent University of Washington School of Medicine.

item.title: 👍Aaron Pelly - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Aaron Pelly signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Abigail Gambrill - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Abigail Gambrill signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Jenna Morris - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Jenna Morris signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Kasey Girven - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Kasey Girven signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Lucas O'Bryan - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Lucas O'Bryan signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Rachel Woods-Robinson - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Rachel Woods-Robinson signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍💵Connor Haggerty - University of Washington School of Medicine
item.description: Connor Haggerty signed up to testify Pro. They are a registered lobbyist.
